name: Crisp
description: Crisp is a customer messaging platform that lets you manage live chat conversations, support inboxes, and customer profiles. Use it to send and receive messages, resolve conversations, and maintain a unified view of your contacts across channels.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List conversations for a website with pagination and filtering.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new conversation for a website.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific conversation including metadata and state.

capabilities.name: conversations_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a conversation permanently from a website.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full message history for a specific conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send a message in a conversation. Supports text, files, and structured content.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by its fingerprint from a conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing message in a conversation by its fingerprint.

capabilities.name: messages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific message from a conversation by its fingerprint.

capabilities.name: conversation_state_get
capabilities.description: Get the current state of a conversation (pending, unresolved, or resolved).

capabilities.name: conversation_state_update
capabilities.description: Change the state of a conversation to pending, unresolved, or resolved.

capabilities.name: conversation_meta_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for a conversation including nickname, email, and device info.

capabilities.name: conversation_meta_update
capabilities.description: Update metadata for a conversation such as nickname, email, or segments.

capabilities.name: conversation_routing_get
capabilities.description: Get the current operator routing assignment for a conversation.

capabilities.name: conversation_routing_update
capabilities.description: Assign or reassign a conversation to a specific operator.

capabilities.name: conversation_transcript_request
capabilities.description: Request a conversation transcript to be sent via email.

capabilities.name: conversation_participants_list
capabilities.description: List all participants in a conversation.

capabilities.name: conversation_participants_update
capabilities.description: Set the list of participants in a conversation.

capabilities.name: people_list
capabilities.description: List all people profiles in your Crisp people database with pagination.

capabilities.name: people_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact profile in your Crisp people database.

capabilities.name: people_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a contact's full profile including email, name, and metadata.

capabilities.name: people_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing people profile with new details.

capabilities.name: people_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a people profile permanently from the database.

capabilities.name: people_conversations_list
capabilities.description: List all conversations associated with a specific people profile.

capabilities.name: people_data_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve custom data fields associated with a people profile.

capabilities.name: people_data_update
capabilities.description: Update custom data fields for a people profile.

capabilities.name: people_events_list
capabilities.description: List tracked events for a specific people profile.

capabilities.name: people_events_create
capabilities.description: Track a new event for a specific people profile.
